name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatillos (18 ounce), drained and chopped
1 can tomatoes (14 oz), undrained and chopped
1 can chili peppers, undrained (4 oz), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large saucepan with cooking spray.
2. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil and cook the chicken breasts for 3 minutes or until done. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
3. Add shallots and garlic to the pan and sauté until tender.
4. Add all ingredients up to, but not including beans. Bring to a boil and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add the beans along with the cooked chicken back into the pan. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until heated through.
6. Stir in lime juice and pepper just before serving.
7. Ladle into bowls and top with cheese.
